purpose: Defines the expected filename prefix format for Zwick UTM artefacts
usage: Validated in core routing/rename flow while processors focus on staging and pairing

purpose: Signals that staged Zwick UTM artefacts are ready for processing
usage: The `.xlsx` file that triggers final processing of a `.zs2` series

purpose: Defines the in-memory key used to join staged `.zs2` and `.xlsx` artefacts within a session
usage: Derived from the filename stem and used only for series map insert/lookup

purpose: Describes incorrect suffix metadata when moving failed artefacts to exceptions
usage: Can mislabel raw payloads (for example `.ZS2`) as `.xlsx` during fallback handling

purpose: Defines how case-only sample-name differences are normalized during appends to an existing record
usage: When incoming sample casing differs only by case use the existing record sample casing for path and file ID derivation
